holdings.infoBox: TIME is an equity ETF with a total of 48 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 9.76%, NVIDIA at 8.76%, Alphabet at 8.36%, ProShares UltraShort QQQ at 3.93%, and Amazon.com at 3.89%.

overview.description: The Clockwise U.S. Core Equity ETF (TIME) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed and aims to provide long-term growth by investing in US equities focused on providing technical advancements. The fund may go long or short equity exposure through leveraged or inverse ETFs. TIME was launched on Jan 27, 2022 and is issued by Clockwise Capital.

data.title: Clockwise Announces Yearly Distributions on $TIME
